disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Several days of heavy, non-stop urination and constant excessive thirst preceding the illness
trigger_question_examples: How did this start over the last few days?
Has he been drinking or passing water more than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For about three days he couldn't stop urinating and was constantly thirsty — drinking jug after jug of water day and night.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reduced and fluctuating level of consciousness — drowsy, hard to rouse, confused speech
trigger_question_examples: Is he awake and responding normally?
Can you wake him and is he making sense?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He is very drowsy and I can barely wake him; when he does talk he is confused and not making sense.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound generalised flaccid muscle weakness — bedbound and unable to move limbs
trigger_question_examples: Can he move his arms and legs and get out of bed?
How weak is he compared to normal?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His arms and legs have gone completely floppy — he can't lift them or stand, he's been stuck in bed since yesterday.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Persistent vomiting with inability to tolerate oral intake, in a drowsy patient
trigger_question_examples: Is he still vomiting and can he keep anything down?
How much has he been able to eat or drink today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He keeps vomiting and can't keep anything down — no food and no water is staying in.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Palpitations — sensation of a racing, skipping heartbeat
trigger_question_examples: Has he mentioned anything about his heart?
Is his heart racing or beating oddly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He keeps saying his heart is racing and skipping beats.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No bowel motion for around four days, with abdominal fullness
trigger_question_examples: When did he last open his bowels?
Is his tummy bloated or uncomfortable?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He hasn't been to the toilet properly in about four days and his stomach looks bloated.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Takes a regular thiazide-type fluid tablet and over-the-counter calcium supplements
trigger_question_examples: What medications does he take regularly?
Does he take any supplements or vitamins from the chemist?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He takes a water tablet for his blood pressure and some calcium tablets he buys from the chemist.
